_endpoint: GET /api/tenancy/tenants/{slug}/command-center  (PROPOSED future BFF aggregate — does NOT exist yet)
_note: This is a PROPOSED future backend contract, not an assumed existing endpoint — do not call it in this slice. The Command Center is COMPOSED today from existing endpoints: /tenant + /subscription + /products + /entitlements + /plans, with per-product readiness[] and evidence{} from each product's own summary surface (e.g. GET /api/invoicing/tenants/{slug}/summary, GET /api/tax-compliance-ec/tenants/{slug}/period-status, GET /api/growth/tenants/{slug}/inbox-summary). This file documents the shape a single read-only aggregate SHOULD return so the post-login screen can avoid an N-call fan-out once a backend team builds it. CONTRACT TO HARDEN: the exact readiness fields per product are owned by each product domain — the shapes below are the design's expectation, not a frozen contract. readiness[].tone ∈ success|warning|neutral.
